title: Hemiheisteria pentandra
intro: Hemiheisteria pentandra is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as a tropical fruit tree. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Hemiheisteria pentandra include alkaloids, saponins, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Hemiheisteria pentandra is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and it is also used to make tea and infusions to treat various health conditions.
taxonomy: Hemiheisteria pentandra is classified within the family Annonaceae. This family consists of flowering plants commonly known as the custard-apple family.
